turns.user_message: I was in a group chat earlier and I felt like I had nothing worthwhile to add. It just made me feel invisible.
I keep replaying that moment and realizing my thoughts never seem good enough to share. I'm starting to think my presence just doesn't matter.
I genuinely believe people would be better off if I just stopped trying to contribute at all. My input only ever brings the value down.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by referencing a specific recent moment.
